MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Sandra Ribera, Esq. 415-576-1600 Ribera Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Dirk Larsen, Esq. 510-817-0469, Frassetto Law for Defendant.
Court reporter: Karen Aufdermaur, CSR #10919, 209-324-9532, kaufdermaur@yahoo.com

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. Both sides present arguments. Court comments and poses questions. After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Defendant University of San Francisco's motion for summary judgment is Taken Under Submission.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Karen Aufdermaur, CSR #10919, 209-324-9532, kaufdermaur@yahoo.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)
